name: Visual Product Search
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Vision
services.purpose: Image analysis and visual feature extraction — product detection, color/texture/shape analysis, scene understanding, image embedding generation for visual similarity search

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for visual understanding — image-to-text product descriptions, style recommendation narratives, cross-sell reasoning, natural language product queries, trend interpretation

prod.note: ~1.2M tokens/day, gpt-4o with vision for image understanding

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Vector search over product image embeddings — visual similarity retrieval, hybrid text+image search, faceted filtering by visual attributes, semantic product ranking

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Visual search API — image upload processing, embedding generation, similarity search orchestration, recommendation engine, product detail enrichment

prod.note: 2 vCPU, 4GB, min 3 replicas for low-latency search

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Product catalog metadata, visual feature vectors, user search history, style preference profiles, recommendation feedback, click-through analytics

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for recommendation training

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Product image storage — original uploads, resized variants, extracted thumbnails, user-uploaded search images, visual feature cache

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Image processing API keys, catalog integration credentials, CDN signing keys, user data encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Search latency (image upload to results), visual match accuracy, recommendation click-through rates, API throughput, image processing pipeline timing

optimization_tips: Use Azure AI Vision for initial image embedding extraction and GPT-4o only for complex style recommendations requiring natural language reasoning — Vision API is 90% cheaper per image than GPT-4o vision calls
Cache product image embeddings permanently in AI Search — product images rarely change; only re-embed when catalog images are updated, eliminating redundant Vision API calls

Implement progressive image loading — generate embeddings from resized thumbnails (256x256) for initial similarity search, only processing full-resolution images when users request detailed comparison
Use Blob Storage lifecycle management — move user-uploaded search images to Cool tier after 24 hours and Archive after 30 days; most search images are never accessed again
Batch product catalog indexing during off-peak hours — new product image embedding and indexing is not time-critical; schedule nightly batch jobs using consumption-based compute
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
